name: Cherry Cream Angel Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cake into 1/4-inch slices.
2. Arrange half of the slices on the bottom of a 9x13 baking dish.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine the condensed milk, water, and extract; mix well.
4. Add the pudding mix and beat until combined.
5. Chill for 5 minutes.
6. Fold in the whipped cream.
7. Spread half of the cream mixture over the cake slices.
8. Top evenly with one can of pie filling.
9. Cover with the remaining cake slices, cream mixture, and the other can of pie filling.
10. Chill until set.
11. Cut into squares to serve.
12. Refrigerate leftovers. Other flavors of pie filling may be used.
